message:
[high] google-admin-reports: pin base_url to googleapis.com and reject q/f/u

from_params accepted any base_url override with zero validation
(unwrap_or(DEFAULT_BASE_URL) straight into &config.base_url for
with_base_url), so a configure payload could redirect every Admin
Reports audit-log call to an attacker host — including calls that
carry highly-sensitive Google Workspace audit data (logins, drive
access, admin actions). Weakest link in the Google-connector
surface until this patch.

- New validate_admin_reports_base_url() rejects non-googleapis.com
  hosts (via url::host suffix match, so googleapis.com.evil.com and
  evil-googleapis.com are rejected) unless the override targets a
  local test host. Plain http rejected on any non-local host.
  Userinfo, query, and fragment components all rejected because
  AdminReportsClient builds request URLs via format!("{base_url}/...")
  downstream.
- Seven new unit tests: googleapis accept, localhost http accept,
  foreign-host reject, substring-smuggle reject, query/fragment/
  userinfo reject, plain-http-on-public-host reject, and
  host_is_googleapis truth table.

Verification: `cargo check -p fcp-google-admin-reports` under
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-p7 cannot complete because
crates/fcp-crypto/src/hpke_seal.rs:366 still has the committed
indentation regression blocking every transitive build (same
blocker surfaced in asana/airtable/linear/google-drive this
session, outside this pane's domain). Diff reviewed manually:
additions are std url::Url accessor calls matching the google-drive
validator from c9c141c2 exactly; `with_base_url(&config.base_url)`
signature at :242 unchanged (takes &str, String derefs cleanly).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
